title: Common App — Ms. Mac essay
html:
Yahir's Common App essay drafts on gratitude — both centered on ms mac, his middle school teacher who pulled him out of permanent detention into her classroom and later sponsored the National History Day project that won him a hamilton broadway viewing in NYC.

TL;DR

  • The ms mac essay is Yahir's load-bearing origin story for "I think outside the box" — recurs verbatim across 2023 02 02 UO Diversity Excellence and 2023 11 07 Redwood Foundation Essays.
  • Names the source book Espionage and Enslavement in the Revolution: The True Story of Robert Townsend and Elizabeth by Claire Bellerjeau and Tiffany Yecke Brooks.
  • Stated career goal in this draft: immigration lawyer (pre-CS-pivot — interesting that this stays in scholarship apps for months after he was already CS-major-bound).
  • Self-described as "first generation student" — frame Yahir uses for nearly every 2023 application.

ms mac · hamilton broadway · college application arc · immigration lawyer aspiration · al forthan
